key.title: Key
key.description: Key helps determine what to do next.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description includes human readable details about what steps should be
take next.

bill.Action.description: Action provides a suggestion about what to do next with the document.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code is generated by the system that raised the condition.

paths.title: Paths
paths.description:
Paths contains an array of JSON paths that maps the GOBL specific error
to a field inside the envelope that the condition is applied to.

message.title: Message
message.description: Message contains human readable details about the specific condition.

bill.Condition.description: Condition provides a more formal structure for describing with a specific code what has been unacceptable about the source document, including potentially references to the fields causing issues.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description contains a simple text that describes the reason why the
original document was not processed.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description:
Condition provides additional details with codes about what has gone
wrong with the incoming document.

bill.Reason.description: Reason helps the recipient of a message determine why they are receiving it.

$regime.title: Tax Regime
$regime.description:
Country code that identifies the tax regime applicable to the document.
It determines which country-specific tax rules, normalizations, and validations are applied.
It may be determined automatically via normalization of a supplier or issuer tax identity
country code.

$addons.title: Addons
$addons.description:
Addons defines a list of keys used to identify tax addons that apply special
normalization, scenarios, and validation rules to a document.

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of status being reported (e.g. "system" for internal events).

issue_date.title: Issue Date
issue_date.description: IssueDate is the date when the status event occurred.

issue_time.title: Issue Time
issue_time.description: IssueTime is the time when the status event occurred.

series.title: Series
series.description: Series is an optional code to group related status events together.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code provides a way to identify the specific status event being reported.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Ext provides additional structured data specific to the regime or addon.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description:
Ordering provides links to related documents and details that may have occurred
before this status was created.

supplier.title: Supplier
supplier.description:
Supplier represents the entity supplying the goods or services in the
original transaction and may not be the issuer of the document.

customer.title: Customer
customer.description:
Customer is optional and describes the recipient of the original
services. In the case of a local or system event, this will be empty.

issuer.title: Issuer
issuer.description:
Issuer represents an intermediary acting on behalf of either the supplier
or customer in order to provide a status update, this is useful
specifically if only the third party is registered on a network.
(Optional).

recipient.title: Recipient
recipient.description:
Recipient represents another intermediary responsible for receiving the
event when the supplier or customer do not have networking capabilities.
May also be a tax agency in a five corner model.
(Optional).

lines.title: Lines
lines.description:
Lines contain the main payload of the message used to describe individual
documents which have a status. A message may not have any lines.
(Optional).

complements.title: Complements
complements.description: Complements contain regime/addon specific payload data.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Notes for additional details about the event.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Meta contains unstructured data useful for internal tools.

bill.Status.description: Status represents a system or business event that needs to be recorded for compliance purposes.

index.title: Index
index.description: Position of the row inside the message, determined automatically.

key.title: Key
key.description: Status Key indicates the situation of the document

date.title: Date
date.description: When this row should be considered effective

doc.title: Document
doc.description:
Document reference or details about the document that needs to be looked
at.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description includes a human readable description that explains the
reason for the current status, if necessary.

reasons.title: Reasons
reasons.description:
Reasons define an array of reason objects that help the recipient
determine why the status was provided.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description:
Actions contains an array of actions that should be carried out by the
recipient of the message. These are suggestions.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions for local or format focussed data

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Additional data specific for the source system.

bill.StatusLine.description: StatusLine represents a single row inside a message, that describes the situation of another business document.
